subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Render thanks that thou art confirmed in sacrificing thyself in the pathway of the Divine Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی حمد کن که بجانفشانی در سبیل جمال ربانی مویدی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
